allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([a['name'] for a in data]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{i[\\"rating\\"]:8} {i[\\"status\\"]:12} {i[\\"title\\"][:60]}'\) for i in data]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('regs:', len\(d['regulations']\), 'controls:', len\(d['controls']\), 'issues:', len\(d['issues']\), 'apps:', len\(d['applications']\), 'findings:', len\(d['findings']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('API proxy OK - regs:', len\(d['regulations']\), 'findings:', len\(d['findings']\)\)")
